summary: Verified new /api/deliveries/{id}/download-pdf endpoint fix for Android PDF filename bug. Backend returns proper Content-Disposition with OVOSANTI-{plate}-{date}.pdf format and required cache headers. Frontend correctly uses the new endpoint in Android, iOS, and desktop branches. Android flow verified end-to-end with UA spoofing: suggested filename is correct format (not UUID).
passed: GET /api/deliveries/{id}/download-pdf returns 200 with valid PDF (3313 bytes)
Content-Disposition header: attachment; filename="OVOSANTI-CFG-001-2026-06-25.pdf" (correct format, NOT UUID)
Frontend DeliveryHistory.js uses new endpoint in Android (line 94), iOS (line 128), and desktop (line 162) branches
No references to old /api/files/ endpoint in download flow
Android UA flow (UA spoofed): browser triggers download with URL /api/deliveries/{id}/download-pdf and suggested filename OVOSANTI-CFG-001-2026-06-25.pdf
Success toast 'PDF descargado. Revisa tus notificaciones' shown on Android flow
Desktop blob download flow initiates correctly (Preparando descarga toast)
